question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यासाठी, प्रत्येक जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि प्रसूती व बाल कल्याण केंद्रांची एकूण संख्या यांची यादी करा, ही यादी एकूण संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा आणि फक्त पहिले ५ जिल्हे दर्शवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT T1.district_name, SUM(T3.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres 
FROM dim_district T1 
JOIN dim_sub_district T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id 
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care T3 ON T2.sub_district_id = T3.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_state T4 ON T1.state_id = T4.state_id 
WHERE T4.state_name ILIKE 'andhra pradesh' 
GROUP BY T1.district_name 
ORDER BY total_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres DESC

SELECT d.district_name, COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count 
FROM dim_district d 
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id 
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id 
WHERE s.state_id IN (1, 2) AND d.district_id BETWEEN 1 AND 3 
GROUP BY d.district_name 
HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 0 
ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC 
LIMIT 5;

ORDER BY sub_district_count DESC 
LIMIT 5;
